hero_desc: Analyze thousands of comments across dozens of videos in seconds. Catch hidden profanities, compile audience questions, and grow your channel rapidly.
feat_desc: See far beyond what your audience is saying.
feat_1_desc: Understand your audience by reporting the general sentiment (positive/negative) in percentages.
feat_2_desc: Accurately catch comments containing hidden or disguised profanities and insults.
feat_3_desc: Get summarized lists of what your followers expect from you or what they dislike.
feat_4_desc: Automatically list critical questions asked by your audience for your next Q&A video.
feat_5_desc: Download all analysis data anytime with a single click as a sleek Excel (XLSX) report.
feat_6_desc: Easily expose fake or duplicate spam comments from bot accounts.
price_desc: Choose the plan that fits your needs and start analyzing immediately. No hidden fees or contracts.

faq_section_desc: Find answers to your questions here.
faq_q1: How long does an analysis take?
faq_a1: Fetching and analyzing video comments usually takes 15-30 minutes. You will receive an email notification once completed.
faq_q2: Which languages do you support for comments?
faq_a2: Our platform supports multiple languages, predominantly English and Turkish.
faq_q3: In what format is my report delivered?
faq_a3: Analyses are delivered as a detailed multi-sheet Excel (.xlsx) file, containing sentiment distribution, top-liked comments, criticisms, and suggestions.
faq_q4: What is the difference between a one-time package and a subscription?
faq_a4: With a one-time package, you purchase the right to analyze 1 video. With a subscription, you get a monthly-renewing balance of analysis credits.
faq_q5: How does the credit system work?
faq_a5: Each package purchase loads analysis credits to your account. One credit is deducted per video analysis request.
faq_q6: How many comments can be fetched?
faq_a6: By default, the first 1,000 comments of a video are analyzed. This limit can be increased upon request.
faq_q7: What happens if a YouTube API quota or access issue occurs?
faq_a7: In such a case, the analysis process is restarted and you will be notified by email. Your credit will not be deducted.
faq_q8: How will I be notified when my analysis is complete?
faq_a8: An automatic notification email is sent to the address you provided during registration when your analysis is completed.
faq_q9: How many times can I download my report?
faq_a9: Your report is stored indefinitely in the 'Past Analyses' section of your dashboard and can be downloaded as many times as you like.
faq_q10: Can videos with disabled comments be analyzed?
faq_a10: Videos with disabled or restricted comments cannot be returned by the YouTube API and therefore cannot be analyzed.
faq_q11: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq_a11: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. After cancellation, your service continues until the end of the current billing period.
faq_q12: Can I use it for multiple YouTube channels?
faq_a12: Yes, you can add links to videos from different channels one by one. You can analyze unlimited channels as long as your credit balance allows.
faq_a13: Yes. All uploaded reports are stored on encrypted servers and are exclusive to your account. They are never shared with third parties.
faq_q14: Can multiple people use the Agency package?
faq_a14: The Agency package operates under a single account; however, you can analyze videos from multiple clients through this account.
faq_a15: Since payments are processed through the Stripe infrastructure, an invoice/receipt is automatically sent to your email.
